candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line and non-current, not ACT.

candidates.row_label: Profit/loss from disposal of non-current assets
candidates.why: Cash flow statement item, unrelated to total current assets.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet match for cash and cash equivalents.
Possible equivalent label, but 'Cash and cash equivalents' is cleaner and more standard.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending balance matches CHE numerically, but balance sheet label is preferred.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the start of the period
candidates.why: Beginning-of-period cash, not the balance-sheet ending cash position.

candidates.row_label: Exchange rate differences in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Not the cash balance itself.
Unrelated non-cash adjustment line.

variables.notes: Preferred label is 'Cash and cash equivalents'; included 'Cash and bank balances' as secondary because labels may vary across years and values match.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not LCT.
Balancing line and non-current.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Appears within the current liabilities section and is the best available balance-sheet label for current borrowings/short-term debt; excludes lease liabilities because leases are listed separately.
Cash flow movement, not the balance-sheet stock of short-term debt; useful clue only.

variables.notes: Selected 'Borrowings' because it sits in the current liabilities section and lease liabilities are separately disclosed as 'Current lease liabilities, interest-bearing', which are excluded from STD.

candidates.why: Best available current balance-sheet label for taxes payable/current tax liability.
Deferred tax is non-current/timing-related and should not be used for taxes payable.
Deferred tax, not current taxes payable.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate was provided, but 'Tax liability' is a confident exact match for current taxes payable under current liabilities.

candidates.why: Best reported balance-sheet total for property, plant and equipment/tangible fixed assets.
Semantically ideal, but values are blank in the preview; 'Total tangible assets' is the cleaner reported line here.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Gross lease-related component only, not total net PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not PPE total.
Intangibles, not PPE.
Capex flow, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Impairment - Property, Plant & Equipment including Intangible Assets - Cash Flow - to Reconcile
candidates.why: Cash flow reconciliation item, not PPE stock.
Cash flow and intangible-related, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Total tangible assets Securities held as fixed assets - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing artifact, not the reported PPE line.
Balancing line, not the reported total.

variables.notes: Preferred reported label is 'Total tangible assets'. Included 'Property, Plant & Equipment - Net - Total' as secondary because labels may vary by year even if preview shows blanks.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.
Direct match for net cash flow from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before working-capital changes, not the final OANCF measure.

variables.notes: Selected the final net operating cash flow line, not the pre-working-capital subtotal.
